lab.c12agriculture_are_engineered_to_exp: Yeh *Bacillus thuringiensis* se Bt toxin ko zahir karne ke liye tayyar kiye gaye hain. Toxin insect gut mein receptors se bandhta hai, pores banata hai jo pest ki maut ka sabab banta hai jabke insaanon ke liye be-asar rehta hai.
lab.c12agriculture_at_a_bt_toxin_express: At a Bt toxin expression level of

lab.c12agriculture_contains_elevated_h_i: Yeh H⁺ ions ko barhata hai. Yeh ions zaroori nutrient cations jaise Ca²⁺ aur Mg²⁺ ko nakaratmak charge wale zameen ke clay particles se hata dete hain. Phir nutrients leached ho jate hain, jo zameen ki khushkhalai ko khatam kar dete hain.
lab.c12agriculture_if_the_pesticide_conc: Agar pesticide concentration ko configure kiya gaya hai
lab.c12agriculture_irreversibly_inhibit_: Insects mein Acetylcholinesterase (AChE) ko laazmi tor par rokta hai. AChE ke baghair, acetylcholine synapse mein ikattha hota hai, jo musalsal nerve impulses, paralysis, aur maut ka sabab banta hai.
lab.c12agriculture_rate_activity_loss_co: kaise hoga (Rate: Activity loss = conc × time × 2)
lab.c12agriculture_rate_survival_loss_ex: kaise hoga (Rate: Survival loss = expression × time × 2)

lab.c12biochemistry_1_given_km_20_mm_and: 1. Km = 20 mM aur Ki = 10 mM diya gaya hai. Jab [Inhibitor] = 10 mM ho toh apparent Km kya hoga ek competitive inhibitor ke liye?
lab.c12biochemistry_2_at_what_exact_ph_w: 2. Kis exact pH par Amino Acid B (pI = 6.0) electric field mein migrate nahi karega?
lab.c12biochemistry_amino_acids_possess_: Amino acids ka ek isoelectric point (pI) hota hai jahan yeh koi net electrical charge nahi rakhte. Ek buffer solution mein, agar pH < pI, amino acid protonated (positive) hota hai aur cathode (-) ki taraf migrate karta hai. Agar pH > pI, yeh deprotonated (negative) hota hai aur anode (+) ki taraf migrate karta hai. Jab pH = pI hota hai, yeh stationary rehta hai.
lab.c12biochemistry_bind_to_an_allosteri: ek allosteric site se bandhta hai, enzyme ke structure ko badalta hai. Yeh Vmax ko kam karta hai kyunki functional enzymes pool se hata diye jate hain, lekin Km unchanged rehta hai kyunki active site ki affinity par asar nahi hota.
lab.c12biochemistry_bind_to_the_enzyme_s: enzyme ke active site se bandhta hai, substrate ke saath muqabala karta hai. Yeh apparent Michaelis constant (Km) ko barhata hai lekin Vmax unchanged rehta hai kyunki high substrate concentrations inhibitor ko outcompete kar sakti hain.
lab.c12electrochemistry_biochemical_oxyg: Biochemical Oxygen Demand (BOD) ko redox titrations (Winkler Method) ka istemal karke paani mein dissolved O₂ dhoondne ke liye napta hai. Mn²⁺ oxidized hota hai, phir iodide ke saath react karta hai, aur thiosulfate ke saath titrated hota hai.
lab.c12electrochemistry_calculate_the_pr: Apne current cell setup ke liye Nernst equation ka istemal karke precise theoretical voltage (koi noise nahi) ka hisaab lagao.
lab.c12electrochemistry_convert_chemical: chemical energy ko electrical energy mein tabdeel karta hai spontaneous redox reactions ke zariye.
lab.c12electrochemistry_no_data_recorded: Koi data record nahi hua. Ek cell banao aur measurements record karo.

lab.c12industrymaterials_requires_heatin: Limestone (CaCO₃) aur clay ko 1450°C tak rotary kiln mein garam karna zaroori hai. Tez garmi calcination aur fusion ka sabab banti hai, jo solid clinker nodules (mostly tricalcium silicate) banate hain.
lab.c12industrymaterials_what_is_the_exa: Exact clinker yield (%) kya hai bilkul par
lab.c12medicine_acetylsalicylic_acid_irr: (acetylsalicylic acid) Cyclooxygenase (COX) enzymes ko laazmi tor par inhibit karta hai. Ye apna acetyl group active site mein serine residue ko transfer karta hai, arachidonic acid ko block karta hai aur prostaglandin synthesis ko rok deta hai.
lab.c12medicine_at_what_exact_time_in_se: Bilkul kis waqt (seconds mein) cell wall ki integrity gir jayegi
lab.c12medicine_calculate_the_constant_r: Jab dosage set kiya jaye, to inhibition ki constant rate (%/s) calculate karo
lab.c12medicine_contains_a_beta_lactam_r: Beta-lactam ring ek aisi structure hai jo transpeptidase enzyme (PBP) se judta hai aur mukablay mein rokta hai. Ye bacterial cell walls mein peptidoglycan ka cross-linking rokta hai, jo osmotic lysis ki taraf le jata hai.
lab.c12medicine_dosage_what_will_be_the_: Dosage, DNA crosslinking ka percentage kya hoga bilkul
lab.c12medicine_pt_cl_complex_binding_to: Pt-Cl complex Guanine se bind ho raha hai!
lab.c12medicine_pt_nh_cl_is_a_chemothera: [Pt(NH₃)₂Cl₂] ek chemotherapy dawai hai. Ye tumor cells mein DNA ko cross-link karta hai, khaaskar guanine bases par. Ye DNA replication aur transcription ko disrupt karta hai, jo aakhir mein apoptosis tak le jata hai.
lab.c12medicine_serine_residue_acetylate: Serine residue acetylated! Pathway block ho gaya.
lab.c12medicine_use_the_simulation_data_: Simulation data ko pharmacological parameters calculate karne ke liye istamal karo. Ye maan lo ke ye relationship zero-order kinetics ko follow karta hai is model mein:
lab.c12organicsynthesis_1_what_is_the_ma: 1. Diazonium intermediate ko decompose hone se pehle maintain karne ke liye maximum safe temperature (°C) kya hai?
lab.c12organicsynthesis_2_in_an_asymmetr: 2. Ek asymmetric synthesis mein, aapko 90% (S)-Thalidomide aur 10% (R)-Thalidomide ka mixture milta hai. Enantiomeric Excess (% ee) calculate karo.
lab.c12organicsynthesis_azo_dyes_are_man: Azo dyes do marahil ke amal se tayar kiye jate hain:
lab.c12organicsynthesis_first_a_primary_: Pehle, ek primary aromatic amine (maslan, Aniline) ko nitrous acid (NaNO2 + HCl) ke saath thandi temperatures (0-5°C) par react kiya jata hai taake diazonium salt ban sake. Agar temperature 10°C se zyada ho jaye, to unstable diazonium salt phenol mein tabdeel ho jata hai, nitrogen gas release karta hai. Phir 2-Naphthol jese phenol ke saath coupling karne se chamakdar Azo Dye milta hai.
lab.c12organicsynthesis_thalidomide_poss: Thalidomide ek chiral center rakhta hai, jo (R) aur (S) enantiomers ke tor par maujood hai. Tareekhi tor par, isay ek racemic mixture ke tor par diya gaya, jo (S)-isomer ke zariye tragic teratogenic asraat ka sabab bana, jabke (R)-isomer therapeutic tha. Aaj kal asymmetric synthesis chiral catalysts ka istemal karta hai taake ek hi desired enantiomer ban sake, jo high achieve karta hai.
lab.c12spectroscopychromatography_1_base: 1. IR broad peak 3300 cm⁻¹ aur MS base peak m/z=31 ke aadhar par, Sample A ko identify karo. (Ethanol ya Acetone?)
lab.c12spectroscopychromatography_2_for_: 2. Sample B ke liye, 1H NMR ek single peak (singlet) dikhata hai. Iski Mass Spectrum mein base peak ka m/z value kya hai?
lab.c12spectroscopychromatography_determ: Molecular weight (M+ peak) aur structure ko fragmentation ke zariye determine karta hai. Base peak (sabse uncha) sabse stable fragment ion ko represent karta hai.
lab.c12spectroscopychromatography_identi: Functional groups ko identify karta hai. O-H bonds ek broad peak ~3300 cm⁻¹ dikhate hain. C=O bonds ek sharp, strong peak ~1715 cm⁻¹ dikhate hain. C-H bonds sharp peaks ~2900 cm⁻¹ dikhate hain.

Hydrogen environments ko identify karta hai. Splitting (n+1 rule) neighboring protons ko indicate karta hai. Chemical shift (ppm) shielding ko indicate karta hai (maslan, O ke kareeb hona zyada deshielded/higher ppm hota hai).
lab.c12spectroscopychromatography_separa: Compounds ko polarity ke zariye separate karta hai. Ek polar stationary phase (silica) polar compounds ko rokta hai. Zyada polar solvent ka istemal karne se sab compounds ka Rf (Retention factor) barhta hai.

lab.c9electrochemistry_this_redox_reacti: Ye redox reaction exothermic hai. Jab hum titrant daalte hain to temperature changes ko track karke hum equivalence point ko locate kar sakte hain jahan temperature peak hota hai.

lab.c9separationtech_calculate_the_rf_va: Blue dye ke liye Rf value ka hisaab lagao jab solvent front 200 mm par ho.

lab.c9separationtech_mixtures_contain_di: Mixtures mukhtalif substances par مشتمل hain jo ke chemically bonded nahi hain. Hum inhe unki properties ke buniyad par alag karne ke liye mukhtalif physical processes ka istemal karte hain.
lab.c9separationtech_rf_distance_by_spot: Rf = Spot ki distance / Solvent ki distance. Neela dye ke liye: spot 160mm move hua jab solvent 200mm move hua.
lab.c9separationtech_rf_distance_moved_b: Rf = Distance moved by substance ÷ Distance moved by solvent
lab.c9separationtech_used_to_separate_a_: Liquid ko solution se alag karne ke liye istemal hota hai (maslan, pure water ko salty water se). Solution ko garam kiya jata hai jab tak liquid vapor mein nahi badal jata. Phir vapor ko condenser mein thanda kiya jata hai, jo ke dobara ek pure liquid (distillate) mein badal jata hai.
lab.c9separationtech_used_to_separate_mi: Soluble substances ke mixtures ko alag karne ke liye istemal hota hai, jaise colored dyes. Jab solvent paper par upar ki taraf move karta hai, yeh dyes ko unki solubility ke hisaab se mukhtalif speeds par le jata hai.
lab.c9separationtech_what_does_an_rf_val: Rf value 1.0 ka kya matlab hai kisi substance ke paper aur solvent ke saath interaction ke baare mein?

lab.c9statesofmatter_a_solution_is_forme: Jab solute solvent mein ghul jata hai, tab ek solution banta hai. Diye gaye temperature par jo maximum amount solute ghul sakta hai, woh uski solubility hai.
lab.c9statesofmatter_add_sugar_to_100ml_: 100mL paani mein cheeni daalo. Paani ko garam karo taake zyada cheeni ghul sake, phir ise dheere dheere thanda karo. Jab tum ek seed crystal supersaturated solution mein daalte ho, tab kya hota hai dekho!
lab.c9statesofmatter_contains_more_disso: Us temperature par theoretically mumkin se zyada dissolved solute hota hai (bohat unstable).

lab.c9statesofmatter_many_salts_form_hyd: Bohat se salts hydrated crystals banate hain jo trapped water molecules rakhte hain (jaise, Copper(II) Sulfate Pentahydrate, CuSO₄·5H₂O).
lab.c9statesofmatter_solubility_increase: Temperature ke saath solubility badhti hai. Formula hai S = 200 + 2T. Paani ko garam karne ki koshish karo taake zyada cheeni ghul sake!

lab.gpe_adjust_desc: Mass aur height adjust karke dekhein ke Eₚ = mgh kaise scale karta hai.
lab.gpe_correct_feedback: Sahi! 73.6 J. 2 kg kitab usi oonchai par sirf 29.4 J rakhti hai — kam mass = kam stored energy!
lab.gpe_incorrect_feedback: Bilkul nahi. Eₚ = m × g × h = 5 × 9.81 × 1.5
lab.gpe_practice_q: Ek 5 kg ka backpack ek shelf par 1.5 m farsh se upar hai.
lab.gpe_practice_q2: hamein ki gravitational potential energy kya hai? (g = 9.81)
lab.gpe_real_life: Hydroelectric dams paani ko oonchai par store karte hain — har kilogram paani 100 m par 981 J gravitational PE rakhta hai, jo turbines se gir kar electricity mein convert hota hai.
lab.gpe_step1_detail: 🎢 Aap roller coaster car mein baithe hain aur pehli bari pahadi ki taraf click karte hue ja rahe hain. Chain lift mechanism groans karti hai jab yeh aap ko ooncha kheenchti hai. Har meter jo aap oopar jaate hain, energy store hoti hai. E_p = Work = F × S — motor gravity ke khilaf kaam karta hai aap ko uthane mein.
lab.gpe_step1_label: Gravity ke khilaaf kiya gaya kaam karna
lab.gpe_step2_detail: 500 kg ki car (aur aap!) ko constant speed par uthane ke liye jo force chahiye, woh uska weight hai: F = mg. Do passengers ke saath, total mass ≈ 700 kg hai, toh F = 700 × 9.81 = 6,867 N — ek choti car ke weight ke barabar.
lab.gpe_step3_detail: Pehli pahadi 45 meters oonchi hai — yeh vertical height S = h hai. Motor ka work: W = 6,867 × 45 = 309,015 J. Har joule gravitational potential energy ke tor par store hota hai, release hone ka muntazir.
lab.gpe_step4_detail: E_p = mgh = 700 × 9.81 × 45 = 309,015 J — itni energy jo 60W bulb 85 minutes tak jala sakti hai! Crest par aap ek split second rukte hain... phir aap plunge karte hain. Woh stored PE kinetic energy mein convert hoti hai jab aap neeche race karte hain, loops aur corkscrews ke zariye aap ko power deti hai. Jitni oonchi pehli pahadi, utni zyada energy poori ride ke liye!
lab.gpe_subtitle: Kaise Eₚ = mgh kaam karna ki tareef se nikalta hai
lab.hydraulic_adjust_desc: Piston areas aur input force ko adjust karo taake taqat multiplication dekho.
lab.hydraulic_correct_feedback: Sahi! F₁ = 240 N. 50:1 mechanical advantage ke saath, 240 N 12,000 N uthata hai — yeh hydraulics ki taqat hai!
lab.hydraulic_final_desc: Khaarij honay waali Force = raqbay ka tanasub × Dakhli Force
lab.hydraulic_practice_q: Hydraulic lift: A₁ = 0.005 m², A₂ = 0.25 m². Gaadi ka wazan = 12,000 N.
lab.hydraulic_practice_q2: Kya kam se kam input force chahiye?
lab.hydraulic_real_life: Gaadi ke brakes hydraulic multiplication ka istemal karte hain — brake pedal par choti taqat (5 cm² piston) brake pads par 20× zyada taqat banati hai (100 cm² piston), tumhara paon 2-ton ki gaadi ko rok sakta hai.
lab.hydraulic_step1_detail: 🔧 Tum ek mechanic ho jiske paas 1500 kg ki gaadi hai jo uthani hai. Tum ek hydraulic jack frame ke neeche rakhte ho aur handle ko pump karte ho. Blaise Pascal ne yeh dhoondha ke dabao jo ek band container mein fluid par lagaya jata hai, woh sab taraf barabar transfer hota hai. Tum jo dabao handle par banao, woh gaadi tak bina kisi kami ke pohanchta hai.
lab.hydraulic_step2_detail: Chote piston (area = 0.005 m²) ko sirf 240 N se daba kar aap P₁ = 240/0.005 = 48,000 Pa create karte hain — jaise pen ki nok apni hatheli par dabaye. Chota area matlab choti force se bada pressure.
lab.hydraulic_step3_detail: Pascal ke principle se, 48,000 Pa jo aap ne pump handle par banaya woh hydraulic fluid ke zariye BINA KISI KAMI KE transmit hota hai. P₂ = P₁ = 48,000 Pa. Fluid aap ki force ko invisibly wahan pahunchata hai jahan zaroorat hai.
lab.hydraulic_step4_detail: F₂/A₂ = F₁/A₁, to F₂ = (A₂/A₁) × F₁ = (0.25/0.005) × 240 = 12,000 N! Aap ki 240 N push poori car utha deti hai. Mechanical advantage = 50×. Yahi principle aap ki car rokta hai jab aap brake pedal dabate hain, bade excavators control karta hai, aur dentist chairs bhi chlata hai!
lab.hydraulic_step4_label: Khaarij honay waali Force maloom karein
lab.hydraulic_subtitle: Kaise Pascal ka principle ek choti force ko bhaari load uthane deta hai
lab.incorrect_feedback: Ghalat hai. Yad rakhein raftaar simt badalti hai!
lab.ke_adjust_desc: Mass aur velocity ko adjust karein taake v² ka asar pehle haath se dekhein.
lab.ke_correct_feedback: Sahi! 200,000 J. 40 m/s (144 km/h) par yeh 800 kJ hoti — chaar guna zyada! Is liye speed itni khatarnak hai.
lab.ke_final_desc: Kinetic energy = aadha × mass × velocity ka square
lab.ke_incorrect_feedback: Bilkul nahi. Pehle velocity ka square karein: 20² = 400. Phir E = 0.5 × 1000 × 400.
lab.ke_practice_q: Ek 1000 kg ki car 20 m/s (72 km/h) par chalti hai.
lab.ke_practice_q2: hamein ki kinetic energy kya hai?
lab.ke_real_life: Ek car jo 100 km/h par hai, uski kinetic energy 50 km/h par wahi car se 4 guna zyada hai. Ye is liye hai ke speed limits hain — stopping distance speed ke square ke saath badhta hai, aur crash energy tab quadruple hoti hai jab speed double hoti hai.
lab.ke_step1_detail: 🛹 Aap ek bade half-pipe ke oopar hain, dil zor se dharak raha hai. Aap neeche aate hain, aur gravity kaam karti hai. Gravity aap par jo work karti hai woh aap ki kinetic energy mein badal jata hai: E_k = Work = F × d. Jitna tez dhalaan, utna zyada work gravity karti hai.
lab.ke_step2_detail: Gravity aapko force F = mg se kheenchti hai. Jo distance d aap tay karte hain, woh aapki speed se taluq rakhta hai. Rest se shuru karte hue, aapki average speed ramp par v_avg = v/2 hai. Toh d = v_avg × t = (v/2) × t. E_k = (ma)(d) = m × a × (v/2 × t).
lab.ke_step3_detail: Ramp par aap ki acceleration a = v/t hai (aap kitni jaldi speed v tak time t mein pahunchte hain). Plug karein: E_k = m × (v/t) × (v/2 × t). t numerator AUR denominator mein zahir hota hai. Kuch khoobsurat hone wala hai...
lab.ke_step4_detail: Time cancel ho jata hai! E_k = m × v × v/2 = ½mv². Speed double karna matlab energy QUADRUPLE karna. Yahi wajah hai ke 100 km/h par car crash 50 km/h ke crash se 4× zyada destructive hota hai, aur skateboard par double height se girna sirf double nahi lagta — chaar guna zyada lagta hai!
lab.ke_subtitle: Kaise Eₖ = ½mv² work aur Newton ke doosre law se nikalta hai
lab.lp_adjust_desc: Gehraai aur density ko adjust karo taake dekho P = ρgh asal values ke saath kaise kaam karta hai.
lab.lp_correct_feedback: Sahi! 301,658 Pa. Yeh ~3× atmospheric pressure hai! Submarines in forces ko sahne ke liye banayi jaati hain.
lab.lp_incorrect_feedback: Bilkul nahi. P = ρgh = 1025 × 9.81 × 30. Teeno ko zaroor milao!
lab.lp_practice_q: Ek submarine samundari paani (ρ = 1025 kg/m³) mein 30 m tak doobti hai.
lab.lp_practice_q2: Us gehraai par dabao kya hai? (g = 9.81 m/s²)
lab.lp_real_life: Submarines mote hull ke saath banayi jaati hain kyunki 300 m gahrai mein pani ka pressure 30 atmospheres hota hai — ordinary steel ko crush karne ke liye kafi hai. Jitna neeche jayenge, utna zyada pressure.
lab.lp_step1_detail: 🏊 Aap ek boat se samandar mein kood kar neeche gote lagate hain. Aap ke kaano mein ek bechain karne wala pressure banta hai. Pressure = force / area — aap ke oopar paani ka column hai jiska weight hai, aur woh weight aap ke jism ke har square millimeter par dabaav dalta hai.
lab.lp_step2_detail: Taakat paani ka wazan hai: F = mg. Lekin m = ρV (density × volume). Samundari paani ki density 1,025 kg/m³ hai — yeh meetha paani se zyada bhaari hai, isi liye samundar mein tairna asaan hai! F = ρ × V × g.
lab.lp_step3_detail: Aap ke oopar pani ka volume = aap ke jism ka area × depth: V = A × h. To F = ρ × A × h × g. Dekhein area A zahir hota hai — ek chaura shakhs ke oopar zyada pani ka weight hota hai. Lekin aage kuch magical hota hai...
lab.lp_step4_detail: P = F/A = (ρ × A × h × g)/A = ρgh. Area CANCEL ho jata hai! Kisi bhi gahrai par pressure sab ke liye ek jaisa hai chahe jism ki shakal kuch bhi ho. Sirf 10 m gahre mein, pressure double hokar 2 atmospheres ho jata hai. Free divers saalon training karte hain yeh pressure sahne ke liye — pressure aap ke lungs aur sinuses jaisi hawa ki jagahon ko crush kar deta hai.
lab.lp_step4_label: Raqba ko P = ρgh hasl krne ke liye mnsokh karein
lab.lp_subtitle: Kaise P = ρgh dabao aur wazan ki tareef se nikalta hai.
lab.lp_trace2: V = A × h, to P = (ρ × A × h × g) / A
lab.lp_trace3: A khatam hota hai: P = ρgh

lab.m9realnumbers_a_percentage_is_a_frac: A percentage is a fraction out of 100. If a truck carries 400 kg out of a maximum 1000 kg, the fraction is 400 / 1000, which equals 40%.
lab.m9realnumbers_the_absolute_value_x_i: The absolute value |x| is the distance of a number from zero, regardless of direction. The distance between two points a and b is given by |a - b|. Distance is always positive!

lab.m9theorems_elements_in_a_b_c_are_tho: Elements in A ∪ (B ∩ C) are those in A OR in both B AND C.

lab.m9theorems_in_both_cases_an_element_: In both cases, an element is included if it's in A, or it's in both B and C. So they're equal!

lab.orbital_adjust_desc: Slider ko hilakar dekhein ke orbit radius speed aur period ko kaise affect karta hai.
lab.orbital_correct_feedback: Sahi! ~7,658 m/s. ISS 7.66 km/s ki raftaar se safar karta hai — 27,000 km/h se zyada, din mein 16 martaba Zameen ka chakkar lagata hai!
lab.orbital_incorrect_feedback: Bilkul nahi. r = 6,779,000 m, T = 5,562 s. v = 2π(6,779,000)/5,562. km ko m mein tabdeel karo!
lab.orbital_practice_q: ISS 408 km ki altitude par orbit karta hai. Earth ka radius = 6,371 km. T = 92.7 minutes.
lab.orbital_real_life: Geostationary satellites 35,786 km par har 24 hours mein ek baar orbit karte hain, Earth ki rotation se mila kar — is liye satellite TV dishes kabhi hilne ki zaroorat nahi hoti. Sirf 3 satellites poore globe ko cover kar sakte hain.
lab.orbital_step1_detail: 🛰️ Tasawur karein aap 100 km oonchai wale pahad se ek baseball ufqi tor par pheink rahe hain. Woh neeche ghanoosdaar raasta banata hai aur door ja girta hai. Jaise jaise aap door phenkna chahte hain, aapko tez phenkna hoga. average speed = distance / time — yeh sada idea orbital mechanics ka beej hai.
lab.orbital_step2_detail: Ab tasawur karein ki aap 7.8 km/s se pheink rahe hain — itni tez ke Zameen us wicket ke neeche usi sharah se mudti hai jis sharah woh girti hai! Ball kabhi zameen nahi lagti — woh orbit karta hai. Ek mukammal orbit mein, woh circle ka circumference travel karta hai: d = 2πr, jahan r Earth ke center se distance hai.
lab.orbital_step3_detail: 408 km Earth ke oopar (ISS altitude), ek mukammal orbit T = 92.7 minutes leti hai — yeh orbital period hai. ISS crew har roz 16 sunrise aur sunset dekhte hain kyunki woh itni tez orbit karte hain.
lab.orbital_step4_detail: v = 2πr/T = 2π × 6,779,000 m / 5,562 s ≈ 7,660 m/s — 27,000 km/h se bhi zyada! Oonche orbits aahista hain: Moon 384,000 km par sirf 1 km/s se orbit karta hai. Jitna ooncha jayenge, utna hi aaram se aap ka safar hoga.
lab.orbital_step4_label: mdary Raftaar hasl krne ke liye tbdyl karein
lab.orbital_subtitle: v = 2πr/T ko speed aur circular motion ke basic definitions se derive karo
lab.orbital_title: Derivation: msnauy syarh ki mdary Raftaar
lab.p10_coulomb_formula_desc: Jahan k ≈ 8.99 × 10⁹ N·m²/C² (Coulomb's constant) hai. Measurements mein haqeeqi sensor noise (±2%) shamil hai.
lab.p10_coulomb_incorrect_fb: Ghalat. Coulomb's Law formula ko q₂ ke liye dobara tarteeb dene ki koshish karo.
lab.p10_coulomb_no_data: Abhi tak koi data record nahi.
lab.p10_coulomb_q: Ek alag experiment mein, charge q₁ +4 μC par fixed hai. Force sensor 90.0 N repulsive force measure karta hai jab charge q₂ bilkul 2.0 cm door rakha jata hai. q₂ ki magnitude μC mein kya hai?
lab.p10_coulomb_subtitle: Do point charges ke darmiyan electric force ka jaiza lo.
lab.p10_coulomb_theory: Coulomb's Law kehta hai ke do charged objects ke darmiyan electrical force un objects par charge ki quantity ke product ke seedha mutabiq hai aur do objects ke darmiyan faaslay ke square ke ulta mutabiq hai.
lab.p10_coulomb_title: yont 15: kolmb ka Qanoon aur Electrostatics
lab.p10_critical_adjust_desc: Refractive indices ko adjust karo taake critical angle ka tabdeel hona dekho.
lab.p10_critical_correct_fb: Sahi! 41.8°. Is angle ke aage, glass ke andar roshni totally reflect hoti hai — optical fibers ka principle!
lab.p10_critical_final_desc: Critical angle total internal reflection ke liye threshold tay karta hai.
lab.p10_critical_practice_q: Glass ka n = 1.5 hai aur hawa ka n = 1.0 hai. Glass-air boundary ke liye critical angle dhundo.
lab.p10_critical_real_life: Heere chamakte hain kyunki in ka refractive index bohat zyada hai (n=2.42), jis se critical angle sirf 24° banta hai. Andar aane wali roshni total internal reflection se trapped ho jati hai, andar bounce karti hai aur nikalte waqt chamak paida karti hai!
lab.p10_critical_step1_detail: Paani ke neeche tairte hue, aap oopar dekhte hain. Oopar ki duniya ek chamakti hui circle nazar aati hai. Roshni pani (n=1.33) se hawa (n=1.0) mein jaate hue mudti hai. Snell ka law n₁ sinθᵢ = n₂ sinθr mukammal tor par yeh bayan karta hai.
lab.p10_critical_step2_detail: Jaise jaise aap gehra hota hain aur zyada dhale dekhte hain, roshan circle chhota hota hai. Ek khaas angle par, refracted ray 90 degrees par surface ke saath chalti hai. Yeh critical angle hai — is ke baghair, aap pani ke oopar nahi dekh sakte.
lab.p10_critical_step3_detail: sin 90 = 1 ke saath, Snell ka law mukhtasar hota hai: n₁ sinθc = n₂. Pani ki surface ek perfect mirror mein badal jati hai. Critical angle se neeche, total internal reflection shuru ho jata hai.
lab.p10_critical_subtitle: Snell's Law se Total Internal Reflection ke liye θc ka derivation.
lab.p10_critical_title: Akhaz Karna: Critical Angle, TIR ke liye
lab.p10_echo_correct_fb: Sahi! 300 m. Total distance jo tay kiya gaya hai wo 600 m hai (wahan aur wapas), isliye samundar ka farsh 300 m gehra hai.
lab.p10_echo_final_desc: Depth = (Speed × Time) / 2 — sonar aur ultrasound mein istemal hota hai.
lab.p10_echo_incorrect_fb: Ghalat. Yad rakhein 2 se divide karna! d = v×t/2 = 1500×0.4/2
lab.p10_echo_practice_q: Ek jahaz sonar pulse bhejta hai. Echo 0.4 s ke baad wapas aata hai. Paani mein awaaz = 1500 m/s.
lab.p10_echo_practice_q2: Ocean floor ki gahrai maloom karein.
lab.p10_echo_real_life: Chamgadad echolocation istemal karte hain — yeh ultrasonic chirps nikaalte hain aur echoes sunte hain. 17 kHz ki awaaz 1 m door patange se 6 ms mein wapas aati hai, chamgadad ko andhere mein shikar maloom karne deti hai.
lab.p10_echo_step1_detail: Aap ek sonar operator hain jo samandar ki teh map kar rahe hain. Aap ek powerful ping bhejte hain. Speed = distance / time — awaaz 1500 m/s se pani mein travel karti hai.
lab.p10_echo_step2_detail: Ping samandar ki teh se takra kar wapas aata hai. Kul safar wahan AUR wapas: D = 2d. Aap sunte hain, echo ka intezaar karte hain...
lab.p10_echo_step3_detail: Aap ka equipment theek 0.4 seconds measure karta hai ping bhejne aur echo pane ke darmiyan. v = 2d/t matlab 1500 = 2d/0.4. Aawaz ne 600 m ka safar kiya.
lab.p10_echo_step4_detail: d = v × t / 2 = 1500 × 0.4 / 2 = 300 m. 2 se is liye divide karte hain kyunki awaaz neeche AUR upar gayi! Yahi formula ocean floor map karta hai, submarines detect karta hai, aur ultrasound images banata hai.
lab.p10_echo_subtitle: Bunyadi speed se ultrasound depth formula ka derivation.
lab.p10_elecenergy_correct_fb: Sahi! 0.5 kWh. Yeh taqreeban 1.8 MJ energy hai.
lab.p10_elecenergy_final_desc: Energy = Power × Time — aap kitni bijli istemal karte hain
lab.p10_elecenergy_incorrect_fb: Bilkul nahi. E = P × t = 100 × 5 = 500 Wh. 1000 se divide karke kWh mein tabdeel karein.
lab.p10_elecenergy_practice_hint: E = Pt = 100 × 5 = 500 oat giờ = 0.5 klo oat sat
lab.p10_elecenergy_practice_q: Ek 100W rehnumai ki bulb 5 ghante chalta hai. Yeh kitni energy kWh mein consume karta hai?
lab.p10_elecenergy_real_life: Ek typical UK ghar rozana takreeban 10 kWh istemal karta hai. Ye 36 MJ electrical energy hai! Aapke chhat par solar panels takreeban 1 kWh peak sunlight per square meter generate karte hain.
lab.p10_elecenergy_step1_detail: Power batati hai ke kitni tezi se energy istemal ho rahi hai. 2000W AC 2000 J per doosra energy consume karta hai. Jitni der chalta hai, utni zyada energy consume karta hai.
lab.p10_elecenergy_step2_detail: P = E/t, to E = P × t. Agar aap AC 1 ghante (3600 s) chalate hain, E = 2000 × 3600 = 7,200,000 J. Yeh bahut zyada energy hai!
lab.p10_elecenergy_step2_label: Energy ke liye Dobara Arrange Karein
lab.p10_elecenergy_step3_detail: Kyuki P = V × I, hum likh sakte hain E = V × I × t. Ek 2000W AC jo 240V par chalta hai wo I = P/V = 2000/240 = 8.33 A khinchta hai. E = VIt = 240 × 8.33 × 3600 = 7.2 MJ.
lab.p10_elecenergy_step4_detail: E = VIt. Ye voltage, current, aur time ko ek formula mein electrical energy ke liye milaata hai. 1 kilowatt-hour (kWh) = 3.6 MJ. Aapka electricity bill kWh istemal par mabni hai.
lab.p10_elecenergy_subtitle: Deriving energy from power and time
lab.p10_escope_angle: Deflection angle θ lagbhag leaf par charge ke square ke proportional hai.
lab.p10_escope_conduction: Deflection angle θ lagbhag leaf par charge ke square ke proportional hai.
lab.p10_escope_correct_fb: Sahi! musbat rod electrons ko disc ki taraf khenchti hai, leaf ko kam manfi chhorti hai, is liye repulsion (aur angle) ghatta hai.
lab.p10_escope_hint: Kya hota hai electrons ke saath leaf par jab musbat rod disc ke paas layi jati hai?
lab.p10_escope_incorrect_fb: Ghalat. Simulation koshish karna karein! Electroscope ko manfi charge dein, phir musbat rod ko paas layein.
lab.p10_escope_induction: Agar rod disc ko touch karta hai (<mazboot>Conduction</mazboot>), electrons transfer hote hain, electroscope permanently charged ho jata hai.
lab.p10_escope_no_data: Abhi tak koi data record nahi.
lab.p10_escope_q: Ek neutral electroscope ko manfi charged rod touch karti hai, phir rod hata li jati hai. Ek musbat charged rod disc ke paas layi jati hai (baghair touch kiye). Kya leaf angle barhta hai, ghatta hai, ya wahi rehta hai?
lab.p10_escope_subtitle: Induction aur conduction ke zariye electric charge detect karo.
lab.p10_escope_theory: Electroscope charge detect karta hai. Jab charged rod brass disc ke paas laya jata hai, yeh charge separation induce karta hai (<mazboot>Induction</mazboot>). Electrons repel ya attract hote hain, gold leaf ko net charge dete hain jo stem se repels karta hai.
lab.p10_expLiq_adjust_desc: Asal aur zahiri taluq dekhne ke liye expansion coefficients ko adjust karo.
lab.p10_expLiq_correct_fb: Sahi! 1.45×10⁻⁴/°C. Real expansion hamesha apparent se bara hota hai.
lab.p10_expLiq_final_desc: Haqeeqi = Zahiri + Sheeshe ke phailao ke coefficients
lab.p10_expLiq_practice_q: Ek liquid ka apparent expansion γ_a = 1.2×10⁻⁴/°C hai. Glass expansion γ_g = 2.5×10⁻⁵/°C hai. γ_r dhoondhein.
lab.p10_expLiq_real_life: Thermometers mercury ya alcohol expansion ka istemal karte hain — 1°C ka izafa narrow capillary mein liquid ko expand karta hai. Mercury thermometers -39°C se 357°C tak kaam karte hain.
lab.p10_expLiq_step1_detail: Garmiyon ke din, aap outdoor thermometer check karte hain. Laal liquid glass tube mein oopar chadhti hai. Lekin glass bhi phailta hai — aap sirf APPARENT expansion dekh rahe hain.
lab.p10_expLiq_step2_detail: Gamma-r = Gamma-a + Gamma-g. Liquid ka asal expansion (Gamma-r) wo hai jo aap observe karte hain (Gamma-a) plus glass flask ka expansion (Gamma-g). Glass kuch liquid ke asal expansion ko chhupata hai.
lab.p10_expLiq_step3_detail: γ_r hamesha γ_a se bada hota hai. Glass container bhi barhta hai, liquid ke liye extra jagah banata hai.
lab.p10_expLiq_title: Akhaz Karna: Mayat ki Haqeeqi banaam Zahiri Phailao
lab.p10_halflife_def: Half-life (T_½) wo waqt hai jo ek sample mein radioactive nuclei ka aadha hissa decay hone ke liye zaroori hai.
lab.p10_halflife_incorrect_fb: ✗ Ghalat. Ishara: 800 se 100 tak janay ke liye kitni half-lives chahiye?
lab.p10_halflife_q: Ek radioactive sample 800 atoms se shuru hota hai. Bilkul 12 seconds baad, ek detector 100 active atoms ko baqi ginna hai. Is isotope ki half-life seconds mein kya hai?
lab.p10_halflife_subtitle: Radioactive decay curves ka quantitative analysis.
lab.p10_halflife_theory: Radioactive decay ek random amal hai. Decay ki rate active nuclei N ki tadaad ke mutabiq hai jo baqi hai:
lab.p10_linExp_adjust_desc: Values adjust karein dekhen rods temperature ke saath kaise phailti hain.
lab.p10_linExp_correct_fb: Sahi! 7.2 mm. 1 km rail par, yeh 36 cm hai — isliye expansion gaps hote hain!
lab.p10_linExp_incorrect_fb: Bilkul nahi. ΔL = α × L₀ × ΔT. ΔT = 45-15 = 30°C.
lab.p10_linExp_practice_q: Steel rail 20 m lamba 15°C par. Garmiyon mein 45°C. α = 1.2×10⁻⁵/°C. Kitna phailta hai?
lab.p10_linExp_real_life: Railway tracks mein expansion gaps hote hain — steel 0.012 mm/m/°C tak phailta hai. 40°C din par 1 km track sardi se 12 cm lamba ho jata hai.
lab.p10_linExp_step1_detail: Garmiyon ke din, train tracks heat se buckle ho sakte hain. Lambai mein tabdeeli asli length aur temperature tabdeeli ke proportional hai.
lab.p10_linExp_step2_detail: Engineers buckling se bachne ke liye expansion joints ka istamal karte hain. α, linear expansion ka coefficient hai. Steel ka α = 1.2e-5 per °C hai.
lab.p10_linExp_step3_detail: α = ΔL/(L₀·ΔT). 100 m rail jo 15°C se 45°C tak garam hoti hai, 3.6 cm tak phailti hai.
lab.p10_linExp_step3_label: α ke Liye Dobara Arrange Karein
lab.p10_linExp_step4_detail: L = L₀(1 + α·ΔT). Invar mushkil se phailta hai — precision instruments mein istemal hota hai.
lab.p10_linExp_subtitle: α, linear thermal expansion ka coefficient nikaalna.
lab.p10_logic_desc: MYSTERY GATE ko select karo aur mukhtalif inputs test karo taake iski truth table bana sako.
lab.p10_logic_subtitle: Mukhtalif logic gates ko test karo aur unki truth tables ko continuous voltages ke saath observe karo.
lab.p10_logic_theory: Real electronic circuits mein, logic gates continuous voltages ko process karte hain. TTL (Transistor-Transistor Logic) specific voltage thresholds ko define karta hai.
lab.p10_logic_theory2: HIGH (1): 2.0V aur 5.0V ke beech | LOW (0): 0.0V aur 0.8V ke beech | Undefined: 0.8V aur 2.0V ke beech
lab.p10_lorentz_correct_fb: Sahi! Aap ne m = {m} kg paya
lab.p10_lorentz_desc: Ghair maloom mass m ko calculate karo. I vs tan(θ) ka slope = (B·L)/(m·g). g = 9.81 m/s² ka istemal karo.
lab.p10_lorentz_mystery_active: Mystery Mode! Mass 'm' ka pata lagao.
lab.p10_lorentz_subtitle: Ek uniform magnetic field mein current-carrying wire par magnetic force ko measure karo.
lab.p10_lorentz_theory1: Ek wire jiski lambai L hai aur jo current I ko magnetic field B mein carry karta hai, magnetic force Fm ka samna karta hai:
lab.p10_lorentz_theory2: Jab wire mass m ke pendulum ki tarah latakti hai, gravity usay neeche khenchti hai. Equilibrium par angle θ:
lab.p10_lorentz_title: Unit 17: Lorentz Force aur DC Motor Principle
lab.p10_mag_adjust_desc: Values adjust karein dono methods se magnification dekhne ke liye.
lab.p10_mag_correct_fb: Sahi! I = 4 cm (ulta). M = -2 matlab dogna tall aur inverted!
lab.p10_mag_final_desc: takbyr = ks ki Oonchai / jism ki Oonchai = ks ka Fasla / jism ka Fasla
lab.p10_mag_incorrect_fb: M = q/p = 30/15 = 2. Tasveer ki unchai = M×O = 2×2 = 4 cm
lab.p10_mag_practice_q: 2 cm object 15 cm door concave mirror se. Image 30 cm aage banti hai. Magnification aur image height maloom karein.
lab.p10_mag_real_life: Microscopes do lenses ka istamal karte hain — objective magnified asal tasveer banata hai, eyepiece ise aur bhi magnify karta hai. Compound microscopes 1000× magnification hasil karte hain.
lab.p10_mag_step1_detail: Aap magnifying glass se ek choti antique watch dekh rahe hain. Magnification M = I/O. Lens choti cheez ko bara dikhata hai.
lab.p10_mag_step2_detail: Ray diagram geometry se, milte julte triangles M = q/p ko dikhate hain. Lens ek virtual tasveer banata hai jo aapka dimaag bara samajhta hai.
lab.p10_mag_step3_detail: M = I/O = q/p. Concave mirror ke liye, q real images ke liye manfi hota hai.
lab.p10_mag_subtitle: Deriving M = I/O = q/p from geometry
lab.p10_magfield_correct_fb: Sahi! Aap ne m = {m} A·m² paya
lab.p10_magfield_desc: Apne B vs 1/x³ graph ka slope calculate karo taake unknown magnetic moment ka pata lag sake. Slope = 0.2 × m.
lab.p10_magfield_formula_desc: Jahan m magnetic moment hai aur μ₀/4π = 10⁻⁷ T·m/A hai. Hamara magnetometer field ko microteslas (μT) mein measure karta hai.
lab.p10_magfield_incorrect_fb: Ghalat. Apna slope calculation check karein.
lab.p10_magfield_mystery_active: Mystery Mode Active! 'm' ka pata lagao.
lab.p10_magfield_no_data: Abhi tak koi data record nahi.
lab.p10_magfield_subtitle: Magnetic dipole ke axial line par inverse-cube law ka jaiza lo.
lab.p10_magfield_theory: Ek choti bar magnet (magnetic dipole) ke axial line par magnetic field B uske markazi se faaslay x par hai:
lab.p10_magfield_title: Unit 17: Magnetic Field of a Dipole
lab.p10_ohm_formula2: Voltage (V) aur Current (I) ka graph plot karne se, line of best fit ka gradient (slope) Resistance (R) ko darshata hai.
lab.p10_ohm_subtitle: V-I graph plot karke unknown resistance maloom karein.
lab.p10_ohm_theory: Ohm's Law kehta hai ke current (I) voltage (V) ke saath seedha proportional hai ek ohmic conductor mein.
lab.p10_ohm_title: yont 16: Ohm ka Qanoon (Miqdar par mbny)
lab.p10_ohm_valid_number: Meharbani kar ke ek valid number darj karein.
lab.p10_par_adjust_desc: Parallel equivalent dekhne ke liye resistors ko adjust karo.
lab.p10_par_correct_fb: Sahi! 50Ω. Do equal resistors parallel mein aadhi value dete hain.
lab.p10_par_final_desc: Parallel resistances ke liye reciprocals jorte hain.
lab.p10_par_practice_q: Do resistors 100Ω aur 100Ω parallel mein. Equivalent resistance maloom karein.
lab.p10_par_real_life: Ghar ki wiring parallel hai har outlet ko 230V dene ke liye. Ek appliance hatao ko doosron par farq nahi padta.
lab.p10_par_step1_detail: Aap switch dabate hain aur ceiling halka jalti hai. Doosra lamp lagayein — dono chamakte hain kyunki parallel hain. kul maujooda branches mein bat-ta hai.
lab.p10_par_step2_detail: Har branch ke liye Ohm's law ka istamal karte hue: V/Req = V/R₁ + V/R₂ + V/R₃. Voltage sab parallel components par wahi hota hai.
lab.p10_par_step3_detail: V se divide karo: 1/Req = 1/R₁ + 1/R₂ + 1/R₃. Do 100Ω resistors ke liye: 1/Req = 2/100, toh Req = 50Ω. Paths add karne se resistance kam hota hai.
lab.p10_photon_adjust_desc: Frequency ko adjust karo taake photon ki energy aur momentum dekho.
lab.p10_photon_correct_fb: Sahi! 3.61×10⁻¹⁹ J (2.25 eV). Photon ki energy insani paiman par bohat choti hoti hai!
lab.p10_photon_final_desc: Photon energy aur momentum Planck aur de Broglie se.
lab.p10_photon_practice_q: Hari roshni f = 5.45×10¹⁴ Hz. h = 6.63×10⁻³⁴. Photon energy maloom karein.
lab.p10_photon_real_life: Remote controls 940 nm infrared LEDs istemal karte hain — har photon 2.1×10⁻¹⁹ J energy rakhta hai. Aap ka TV hazaron per second detect karta hai.
lab.p10_photon_step1_detail: Max Planck ne yeh dhoondha ke roshni choti choti packets mein aati hai jise photons kehte hain. E = hf — har photon ki energy Planck constant aur frequency ka zarb hai.
lab.p10_photon_step2_detail: halka ke liye c = fλ ko f = c/λ. Laal roshni (700nm) ki frequency neecha. UV halka (380nm se neeche) ki frequency zyada — zyada energetic photons.
lab.p10_photon_subtitle: E = hf = hc/λ aur p = h/λ ka derivation.
lab.p10_potDiv_adjust_desc: Resistors adjust karein voltage divide kaise hota hai dekhne ke liye.
lab.p10_potDiv_final_desc: Output voltage resistances ke ratio par depend karta hai.
lab.p10_potDiv_practice_q: 9V battery R₁=1kΩ, R₂=500Ω. R₂ across V_out kya hai?
lab.p10_potDiv_real_life: Audio equipment mein volume knobs potential dividers hote hain — sliding contact resistive track par chalti hai, loudness ko control karti hai.
lab.p10_potDiv_step1_detail: Aap speakers par volume knob ghumate hain. Andar potentiometer hai — ek variable resistor jo voltage divide karta hai.
lab.p10_potDiv_step2_detail: Jo voltage aap chahte hain woh R₂ ke across hai. Ohm ke law se: V_out = I × R₂.
lab.p10_potDiv_step3_detail: V_out = R₂/(R₁+R₂) × V_in. Voltage resistance ratio ke mutabiq taqseem hota hai. Knob ghoomaao — volume badalta hai!
lab.p10_potDiv_subtitle: V_out = R₂/(R₁+R₂) × V_in ka derivation karna.
lab.p10_power_correct_fb: Sahi! I = 6.25 A. Is liye kettles ko mote tar ki zaroorat hoti hai — yeh zyada maujooda banana karte hain!
lab.p10_power_final_desc: Power = Voltage × Current — circuit mein energy transfer ki rate.
lab.p10_power_practice_q: Ek 1.5 kW kettle 240 V par chalta hai. Yeh kitna maujooda banana karta hai?
lab.p10_power_real_life: Power companies kilowatt-hours (kWh) ke liye charge karti hain. 1 kWh = 3.6 MJ. Ek 100W bulb jo 10 ghante tak chalu rahta hai wo 1 kWh istemal karta hai. Aapka monthly bill = total kWh × rate.
lab.p10_power_step1_detail: Power aapko batata hai ke electrical energy kitni tezi se istemal ho rahi hai. Ek 60W bulb har second 60 J electrical energy ko light aur heat mein tabdeel karta hai. Power = Energy / Time — energy transfer ki rate.
lab.p10_power_step2_detail: Voltage V unit charge per energy hai: V = E/Q. Ek volt ka matlab hai 1 J energy per coulomb charge. Ek 12V battery har coulomb ko 12 J energy deti hai jo flow karta hai.
lab.p10_power_step3_detail: Current I per second flow hone wala charge hai: I = Q/t. Ek ampere = 1 coulomb per second. Jo total charge flow karta hai wo energy ko carry karta hai jo tabdeel hoti hai.
lab.p10_power_step4_detail: P = E/t = (V × Q)/t = V × (Q/t) = V × I. Power = Voltage × Current. Ek 60W bulb 120V par I = P/V = 0.5 A khinchta hai. Aapka phone charger 5V, 2A par 10W power deta hai.
lab.p10_power_subtitle: Voltage aur current ke ta'arif se power formula ka derivation karna.
lab.p10_radDecay_adjust_desc: Half-life aur time ko adjust karo taake exponential decay dekho.
lab.p10_radDecay_final_desc: Radioactive nuclei ke liye exponential decay law.
lab.p10_radDecay_practice_q: Sample 800 nuclei se shuru karna, half-life=5 years. 15 years baad kitne rehte hain?
lab.p10_radDecay_real_life: Smoke detectors mein americium-241 hai (432-year half-life). Yeh air ionize karta hai; smoke is maujooda ko disrupt karta hai, alarm bajata hai.
lab.p10_radDecay_step1_detail: Ek purani lakdi ka aala mila. Carbon-14 dating jawab deta hai. Ek half-life (5,730 years) ke baad, aadhe reh jatay hain: N₁ = ½ N₀.
lab.p10_radDecay_step2_detail: Do half-lives (11,460 years) ke baad, sirf ek chauthai rehti: N₂ = (½)² N₀.
lab.p10_radDecay_step3_detail: n half-lives ke baad: N = (½)ⁿ N₀ = N₀/2ⁿ. Yeh exponential decay hai.
lab.p10_radDecay_step4_detail: N = N₀/2^(t/T½). Agar tool ke paas asal C-14 ka 25% hai, n = 2 half-lives = 11,460 saal purana.
lab.p10_radDecay_subtitle: Exponential decay law N = N₀/2ⁿ ka derivation karna.
lab.p10_resist_adjust_desc: Wire properties ko adjust karo taake resistivity ko amal mein dekho.
lab.p10_resist_correct_fb: Sahi! 1.68×10⁻⁸ Ω·m — copper ki resistivity, electrical wiring ke liye standard hai!
lab.p10_resist_practice_q: Copper wire 5m lamba, A=1×10⁻⁶ m², R=0.084Ω. Resistivity maloom karein.
lab.p10_resist_real_life: Heating elements nichrome (ρ=1.1×10⁻⁶ Ω·m) ka istamal karte hain — high resistivity bijli ko garmi mein tabdeel karti hai. Copper (ρ=1.7×10⁻⁸) current ko bina garmi kiye le jata hai.
lab.p10_resist_step1_detail: Electrician naye ghar mein wiring karta hai. R ∝ L/A. Lambi wires zyada resist karti hain; moti wires kam.
lab.p10_resist_step2_detail: R = ρ × L/A. ρ resistivity hai — material ka inherent opposition current ke liye. Copper ρ = 1.68×10⁻⁸ Ω·m.
lab.p10_resist_step3_detail: ρ = R × A / L. Silver ki resistivity sabse kam hai (1.59×10⁻⁸) lekin yeh bohat mehngi hai. Copper practical champion hai.
lab.p10_resist_step3_label: Resistivity ke Liye Dobara Arrange Karein
lab.p10_resist_subtitle: Resistance aur geometry se resistivity ka derivation karna.
lab.p10_ser_adjust_desc: Resistors ko adjust karo taake series equivalent dekho.
lab.p10_ser_correct_fb: Sahi! 1000Ω. Current I = 10/1000 = 10 mA teeno ke through.
lab.p10_ser_final_desc: Sum of all resistances in series
lab.p10_ser_practice_q: Teen resistors 200Ω, 300Ω, 500Ω series mein 10V battery ke saath hain. Total resistance dhoondo.
lab.p10_ser_real_life: Purane Christmas lights series mein andheri ho jate hain jab ek bulb fail hota hai — toota bulb iklauta maujooda path todta hai.
lab.p10_ser_step1_detail: Purane Christmas lights yad hain jahan EK bulb kharab to POORI string andheri? Yeh series wiring hai. V = V₁ + V₂ + V₃.
lab.p10_ser_step2_detail: Ohm's law ka istamal karte hue: I×Req = I×R₁ + I×R₂ + I×R₃. Har bulb mein wahi current flow karta hai — sirf ek raasta hai.
lab.p10_ser_step3_detail: Req = R₁ + R₂ + R₃. Teen 100Ω bulbs series mein 300Ω total dete hain. Zyada bulbs = zyada resistance = har ek dimmer hota hai.
lab.p10_ser_subtitle: R_eq = R₁ + R₂ + R₃ ko series ke liye derive karna.
lab.p10_shElec_adjust_desc: Values ko adjust karein taake electrical calorimetry specific heat ka pata laga sake.
lab.p10_shElec_correct_fb: Sahi! ~780 J/kg·K — vegetable oils ke liye typical hai!
lab.p10_shElec_final_desc: Electrical heating se liquid ka specific heat.
lab.p10_shElec_incorrect_fb: c_l = (VIt - m_c c_c ΔT) / (m_l ΔT) istamal karein.
lab.p10_shElec_practice_q: Ek 12V, 3A heater 150s tak calorimeter (m_c=0.08kg, c_c=900) mein chalta hai jo 0.3kg liquid ko contain karta hai. Temp 22°C se 42°C tak badhta hai. Specific heat dhoondo.
lab.p10_shElec_real_life: Electric kettle 1L water 20°C se 100°C tak 336,000 J leta hai. 2000W par, taqreeban 168 seconds lagte hain.
lab.p10_shElec_step1_detail: Tum ek electric kettle ko bharte ho aur ise on karte ho. Heating element electrical energy ko garmi mein tabdeel karta hai: Q_heater = V×I×t.
lab.p10_shElec_step2_detail: Garmi paani aur metal calorimeter dono ko garam karti hai: Q_heater = m_l c_l ΔT + m_c c_c ΔT.
lab.p10_shElec_step3_detail: c_l = (VIt - m_c c_c ΔT) / (m_l ΔT). Calorimeter ka hissa ghatao, paani ke mass aur temperature rise se divide karo.
lab.p10_shElec_subtitle: Electrical heating aur calorimetry ka istamal karte hue c_l ko derive karna.
lab.p10_shMix_adjust_desc: Values adjust karein calorimetry khaas heat kaise determine karti hai dekhne ke liye.
lab.p10_shMix_correct_fb: Sahi! ~386 J/kg·K — yeh copper se match karta hai!
lab.p10_shMix_final_desc: Mixture method se solid ka specific heat.
lab.p10_shMix_incorrect_fb: c_s = (m_w c_w + m_c c_c)(T₃ - T₁) / (m_s(T₂ - T₃)) istemal karein.
lab.p10_shMix_practice_q: 0.2kg metal 90°C par 0.15kg paani 25°C mein. Calorimeter: 0.08kg, c_c=900. Aakhri temp=28°C. c_s dhoondain.
lab.p10_shMix_real_life: Chemistry labs mein calorimetry yahi principle istemal karti hai — jaana hua masses ko jaana hua temperatures par milakar unknown material ki khaas heat maloom karna.
lab.p10_shMix_step1_detail: Aap chai bana rahe hain. Garam pani mein thanda doodh milayein. Heat khoya = heat gained.
lab.p10_shMix_step2_detail: Q_s = m_s c_s (T₂ - T₃). Garam solid thanda hota hai, heat kho deta hai.
lab.p10_shMix_step3_detail: Q_w + Q_c = (m_w c_w + m_c c_c)(T₃ - T₁). Dono liquid aur container heat absorb karte hain.
lab.p10_shMix_step4_detail: c_s = (m_w c_w + m_c c_c)(T₃ - T₁) / (m_s (T₂ - T₃)). Sab values lab mein measurable hain.
lab.p10_shMix_subtitle: Calorimetry aur energy ka conservation istemal karte hue c_s derive karna.
lab.p10_tempCo_adjust_desc: Values adjust karein temperature coefficient maloom karne ke liye.
lab.p10_tempCo_correct_fb: Sahi! 0.0039/°C. Copper ka resistance har °C par 0.39% badhta hai.
lab.p10_tempCo_final_desc: Darja Hararat ka ddy sr mkhsos mzahmt (/°C)
lab.p10_tempCo_practice_q: Copper ρ₀=1.68×10⁻⁸ 20°C par. 70°C par ρ_T=2.01×10⁻⁸. α maloom karein.
lab.p10_tempCo_real_life: Incandescent bulbs ka cold resistance ~40Ω hai lekin hot resistance ~400Ω hai — 10× increase surge current ko explain karta hai jab switch on hota hai.
lab.p10_tempCo_step1_detail: Aapka phone freezing din par jaldi khatam hota hai. Resistance temperature ke saath badalta hai. Resistivity mein tabdeelion ka taluq initial resistivity × ΔT se hai.
lab.p10_tempCo_step2_detail: ρ_T - ρ₀ = α ρ₀ ΔT. Copper ke liye α positive hai — resistance garam hone par BARHTA hai.
lab.p10_tempCo_step3_detail: α = (ρ_T - ρ₀)/(ρ₀ ΔT). Copper ka α = 0.0039/°C. Ek copper wire jo 50°C tak garam hota hai, resistance ko 19.5% badha deta hai.
lab.p10_tempCo_step3_label: α ke Liye Dobara Arrange Karein
lab.p10_tempCo_step4_detail: ρ_T = ρ₀[1 + α(T - T₀)]. Carbon aur semiconductors ka NEGATIVE α hai — jo digital thermometers ke liye thermistors mein istemal hota hai.
lab.p10_tempCo_subtitle: Resistivity ka temperature coefficient α derive karna.
lab.p10_tempCo_title: Derivation: Darja Hararat ka ddy sr mkhsos mzahmt
lab.p10_transGain_adjust_desc: Adjust currents to see transistor gain.
lab.p10_transGain_correct_fb: Sahi! β = 200. 0.05 mA 10 mA ko control karta hai — 200× amplification!
lab.p10_transGain_practice_q: Transistor mein I_B=0.05 mA aur I_C=10 mA. β maloom karein.
lab.p10_transGain_real_life: Hearing aids transistors ka istamal karte hain jinka β 100+ hai — ek choti microphone signal (μA) speaker ko mA levels par drive karta hai, 100× amplify karta hai.
lab.p10_transGain_step1_detail: Concert mein, singer microphone mein fıs-fıs karta hai aur stadium bhar jata hai. Andar ek chota transistor amplify karta hai. I_E = I_B + I_C.
lab.p10_transGain_step2_detail: β = I_C/I_B. maujooda gain amuman 50-400. Choti base maujooda bari collector maujooda control karti hai.
lab.p10_transGain_step3_detail: α = I_C/I_E, hamesha thoda kam hota hai 1 se (0.95-0.99). α = β/(β+1).
lab.p10_transGain_step4_detail: I_C = β × I_B. 1μA base change 200μA collector change produce karta hai agar β=200 ho. Aapka smartphone billions ko amplify karta hai!
lab.p10_transGain_subtitle: β = I_C/I_B aur α = I_C/I_E ka derivation.
lab.p10_trans_adjust_desc: Voltages/maujooda adjust karein power conservation dekhne ke liye.
lab.p10_trans_correct_fb: Sahi! 20A. Voltage 10× step down, current 10× step up. 480W = 480W.
lab.p10_trans_practice_q: Step-neeche: V_p=240V, I_p=2A, V_s=24V. I_s maloom karein.
lab.p10_trans_real_life: Phone chargers step-down transformers ka istamal karte hain — 230V deewar par 5V USB par ban jata hai. Turns ratio 46:1 voltage ko mehfooz taur par kam karta hai.
lab.p10_trans_step1_detail: Power plants 25,000V par generate karte hain. Transformers 500,000V tak step up karte hain. Ideal transformer power ko conserve karta hai: Power_in = Power_out.
lab.p10_trans_step2_detail: P = IV dono coils ke liye: I_p V_p = I_s V_s. High voltage = low current = low I²R heating losses.
lab.p10_trans_step3_detail: I_s = (V_p/V_s) × I_p. Step-down transformer (500kV→230V) ka V_p/V_s ≈ 2174 hai. Current 2174 se multiply hota hai.
lab.p10_trans_step3_label: doosra maujooda ke Liye Hal Karein
lab.p10_trans_step4_detail: V_s/V_p = N_s/N_p = I_p/I_s. Voltage ratio turns ratio ke barabar hai, current ratio ka inverse.
lab.p10_trans_subtitle: Power ka conservation se I_p V_p = I_s V_s derive karna.
lab.p10_volExp_adjust_desc: Adjust values to see volume expansion.
lab.p10_volExp_correct_fb: Sahi! 0.011 m³ (11 L). Liquids solids se zyada phailti hain!
lab.p10_volExp_final_desc: Hajamy Hararaty phylau ka ddy sr
lab.p10_volExp_practice_q: Ek 0.5 m³ alcohol tank 10°C par 30°C tak garam hota hai. β=1.1×10⁻³/°C. ΔV dhoondna hai.
lab.p10_volExp_real_life: Car engine thermostats ek wax pellet ka istamal karte hain jo temperature ke saath expand hota hai — 88°C par ye melt hota hai, coolant valve ko kholta hai taake overheating se roka ja sake.
lab.p10_volExp_step1_detail: Garmiyan mein aap ki car ke fuel tank ka petrol phailta hai. ΔV ∝ V₀ × ΔT. Petrol pumps is liye calibrated hain.
lab.p10_volExp_step2_detail: ΔV = β V₀ ΔT. β volumetric expansion ka coefficient hai. Gasoline β ≈ 9.5×10⁻⁴/°C.
lab.p10_volExp_step3_detail: β = ΔV/(V₀ ΔT). Isotropic solids ke liye, β ≈ 3α. Volume = L³, toh agar length (1+αΔT) se expand hoti hai, volume lagbhag (1+3αΔT) se expand hota hai.
lab.p10_volExp_step3_label: β ke Liye Dobara Arrange Karein
lab.p10_volExp_step4_detail: β = 3α. Yahi wajah hai garam air balloons oopar jaate hain — andar ki hawa phailti hai, kam dense hoti hai, aur tairti hai.
lab.p10_volExp_subtitle: β volumetric expansion ka coefficient ka derivation.
lab.p10_waveeq_correct_fb: Sahi! ~343 m/s. 20°C par hawa mein awaaz ki speed yahi hai!
lab.p10_waveeq_final_desc: Speed = Frequency × Wavelength — tamam lehron ke liye universal.
lab.p10_waveeq_practice_q: Ek sound wave ka f = 440 Hz (middle A) aur λ = 0.78 m hai. Sound ki speed dhundo.
lab.p10_waveeq_real_life: Guitar string ko 82 Hz (low E) par tune karna jiska lambai 0.65 m hai iska matlab hai wave speed 107 m/s hai. String ko kasne se wave speed barhta hai, frequency bhi barhti hai — ye hai guitar ko tune karne ka tareeqa.
lab.p10_waveeq_step1_detail: Tum beach par ho aur lehron ko aate hue dekh rahe ho. Wave speed = distance over time: v = d/t.
lab.p10_waveeq_step2_detail: Ek complete wave cycle mein, ek wave ek time period T mein bilkul ek wavelength tay karti hai. Substituting: v = λ/T.
lab.p10_waveeq_step3_detail: Frequency f = 1/T. Zyada frequency ka matlab hai har second mein zyada lehrain. Light waves ki frequencies bohat zyada hoti hain — 5e14 Hz hareed light ke liye.
lab.p10_waveeq_step4_detail: v = f × λ. Yeh UNIVERSAL wave equation hai — yeh SAB waves ke liye kaam karti hai. Aawaz, roshni, radio, pani ki waves — sab v = fλ maanti hain!
lab.p10_waveeq_subtitle: Bunyadi speed formula se universal wave equation ka derivation.
lab.p10_waveeq_title: Derivation: Universal Wave Equation v = fλ.
lab.p10absorbersreflectors_both_cans_sta: Both cans start at room temperature (20°C). The heater emits infrared radiation equally in both directions.
lab.p10absorbersreflectors_different_sur: Different surfaces absorb thermal radiation at different rates. To test this, a radiant heater is placed exactly halfway between two metal cans: one painted
lab.p10absorbersreflectors_incorrect_hin: ✗ Incorrect. Hint: Base is 20°C, and it rises by 0.2°C per Watt.

Note: 1 mL paani = 1 cm³ volume.
lab.p9_everyday_concept1: Jab object giraaya jata hai, gravity usay taqreeban 9.8 m/s² se accelerate karti hai. Oonchai aur time ka talluq: h = ½gt².
lab.p9_everyday_concept2: Pendulum aage peeche jhoolta hai. Ek mukammal jhoolay ka waqt (Period, T) sirf us ki length aur gravity par munsar hai: T = 2π√(L/g).
lab.p9_everyday_concept3: Sliding box dheere hota hai kyunki floor ek frictional force lagata hai. Yeh distance jo yeh slide karta hai rukne se pehle initial velocity aur friction ka coefficient (μ) par depend karta hai: d = v₀² / (2μg).
lab.p9_everyday_friction_correct: Sahi! Kinetic friction ka coefficient 0.5 hai.
lab.p9_everyday_friction_desc: Box push karein. μ = v₀² / (2gd) istemal karte hue μ calculate karein (g=9.8)
lab.p9_everyday_friction_incorrect: Ghalat. μ = v₀² / (2 × 9.8 × d) istemal karein logs se.
lab.p9_everyday_gravity_correct: Sahi! Gravity ki wajah se acceleration taqreeban 9.8 m/s² hai.
lab.p9_everyday_gravity_desc: Ball giraayein. g = 2h / t² istemal karte hue g (m/s²) calculate karein.
lab.p9_everyday_gravity_incorrect: Ghalat. g = 2h / t² istemal karna yaad rakhein measure ki hui values ke saath.
lab.p9_everyday_instructions: Shelf ki height adjust karo, phir ball ko girane ke liye click karo. Pendulum ki length adjust karo, phir bob ko swing karne ke liye click karo. Box ko floor par slide karne ke liye Push par click karo.
lab.p9_everyday_no_data: Interact with objects to log data.
lab.p9_everyday_theory: Physics hamari rozana environment mein sab kuch govern karta hai! Teen key concepts: Free Fall (h = ½gt²), Periodic Motion (T = 2π√(L/g)), aur Kinetic Friction (d = v₀² / (2μg)).
lab.p9_friction_assessment_hint: Formula istamal karo: μs = Peak Force / (Mass × 9.8)
lab.p9_friction_assessment_q: Unknown Material mode select karein, simulation run karein, aur Peak Force record karein. Us ka coefficient of static friction (μs) calculate karein. (g = 9.8 m/s² maan lein)
lab.p9_friction_hint: F_max = μs × m × g. Kinetic friction aam tor par static se kam hota hai. Rolling mode ko compare karne ke liye try karo!
lab.p9_friction_incorrect_fb: Ghalat. Formula istamal karo: μs = Peak Force / (Mass × 9.8)
lab.p9_friction_instructions: Mass aur surface mode ko adjust karo, phir khinchna shuru karo taake static aur kinetic friction ko observe kar sako. Apne data ko table mein record karo.
lab.p9_friction_no_data: Koi data record nahi hua abhi tak.
lab.p9_friction_record: Max aur Kinetic Forces ko record karo
lab.p9_friction_theory: Friction woh force hai jo solid surfaces ki relative motion ke khilaf mazahemat karti hai. Static friction ko overcome karna padta hai movement shuru karne ke liye. Ek baar harkat karna karne par, kam kinetic friction apply hota hai. Rolling friction sliding friction se kaam hota hai.
lab.p9_inertia_correct_fb: Shabash! Rapid force static friction ko jaldi overcome kar leti hai, jisse coin ki inertia usay glass ke oopar rakhti hai jab tak woh girti nahi.
lab.p9_inertia_incorrect_fb: Kuch jawabat ghalat hain. Inertia aur friction ki theory ka dubara jaiza lein aur dobara koshish karein.
lab.p9_inertia_q1: Jab zor se flick kiya gaya ko coin glass mein kyun gira?
lab.p9_inertia_q1_a: Card ne apni kinetic energy coin ko transfer kar di.
lab.p9_inertia_q1_b: Coin ki inertia ne sideways motion ka resist kiya jabke gravity ne usay neeche khench liya.
lab.p9_inertia_q1_c: Flicking force ne sikay ko seedha neeche ki taraf dhaka diya.
lab.p9_inertia_q2: Agar aap card ko flick karne ke bajaye aahista se khenchein, ko kya hota hai?
lab.p9_inertia_q2_a: Static friction toot-ta nahi; coin card ke saath harkat karna karta hai.
lab.p9_inertia_q2_c: Coin turant glass mein gir jata hai.
lab.p9_inertia_theory: Newton ka Pehla Qanoon-e-Harkat (Qanoon-e-Inertia): Ek cheez jo aaram par hai, aaram par rahegi, aur ek cheez jo harkat mein hai, wahi speed aur wahi direction mein harkat karegi jab tak ke us par ek unbalanced force ka asar na ho. Inertia ek cheez ka wo rujhan hai jo uski harkat ki halat mein tabdeelion ka muqabla karta hai. Jitni zyada mass ek cheez ki hoti hai, utna hi zyada inertia uska hota hai.
lab.p9_kinematics_correct_fb: Aap ke time ki bunyad par sahi! (Asli speed {v} m/s thi)
lab.p9_kinematics_hint: Speed = Distance ÷ Time. Pitch 20.12m hai. Stopwatch se time sahi measure karne ki koshish karein!
lab.p9_kinematics_incorrect_fb: Ghalat. Distance ko APNE time se divide karein.
lab.p9_kinematics_sigfig_desc: Laal line textbook ka edge dikhati hai. Ruler ke nishan centimeters (cm) mein hain. Length ko sahi number of significant figures tak record karo.
lab.p9_kinematics_sigfig_incorrect: Ghalat. Marks ko ghaur se dekhein. Chhotay mark ke aage ek digit ka estimate karein.
lab.p9_kinematics_theory1: Average speed total distance ko total time se divide karne se milti hai. Speed (v) = Distance (d) / Time (t)
lab.p9_kinematics_theory2: Measurement lete waqt, tamam khaas digits aur ek estimated digit record karein. Agar ruler par 1mm ke marks hain, ko aap 0.1mm (0.01cm) tak estimate kar sakte hain.
lab.p9_magfields_assessment_q: Aap ke mushahidat ki bunyad par, magnet ke center ke bilkul oopar magnetic field ki taqribi direction (degrees mein, 0-360, jahan 0=right, 90=neeche) kya hai?
lab.p9_magfields_correct: Sahi! Field North se South ki taraf ishara karta hai, jo magnet ke bilkul oopar seedhe left (180°) hai.
lab.p9_magfields_incorrect: Ghalat. Magnet ke center ke bilkul oopar compass rakh kar dekhein. Arrow kis simt mein hai? (0°=Right, 90°=Down, 180°=Left)
lab.p9_magfields_instructions: 1. Neeche ek tool chunein. 2. Compass: Magnet ke ird gird kahin bhi click karein taake field direction dekhein. 3. Iron Filings: Unhein chhidkain taake overall field pattern zahir ho.
lab.p9_magfields_no_data: Simulator par compasses rakh kar field directions record karo.
lab.p9_magfields_theory: Magnetic field magnet ke aas-paas ka woh ilaqa hai jahan magnetic forces kaam karti hain. Khaasiyaten: Yeh hamesha North pole se South pole ki taraf ishara karte hain magnet ke bahar. Yeh kabhi ek dosre ko nahi kaat-te. Yeh continuous loops hain jo magnet ke andar se wapas aate hain.
lab.p9_magind_assessment_q: Agar tum unmagnetized steel bar ko North pole ke saath Left se Right tak stroke karte ho, toh bar ka kaunsa end North pole ban jata hai (Left ya Right)?
lab.p9_magind_correct: Sahi! Domains ke North poles magnet ke North pole se repel hote hain, akhir mujhe chora ki taraf ishara karte hain. Is liye chora end North banta hai.
lab.p9_magind_guess_left: Domains ke North poles magnet ke North pole se repel hote hain, aur left ki taraf point karte hain. Toh left end North ban jata hai.
lab.p9_magind_incorrect: Ghalat. chora se right stroke karne ke baad red arrows (North poles) ka observe karein. Yeh kis simt mein hain?
lab.p9_magind_instructions: 1. Magnet ko ek end se doosre end tak baar baar steel bar par kheecho taake domains ko align hota dekho. 2. Bar ki orientation badlo aur Hammer Bar ko dabao taake asraat dekho.
lab.p9_magind_no_data: Simulator ke saath interact karo taake data record kar sako.
lab.p9_magind_theory: Unmagnetized steel mein chotay magnetic domains (atoms ke groups) hote hain jo randomly oriented hain. Kyunki yeh har simt mein ishara karte hain, mein ke magnetic fields cancel ho jate hain. Stroking: Magnet ko ek hi simt mein steel par bar bar pherna domains ko align karne par majboor karta hai. Hammering: Dhakkan se metal vibrate hota hai, domains ko external field ke saath align hone deta hai.
lab.p9_measurement_clamp_message: Measuring se pehle object ko sahi tarah clamp karein.
lab.p9_measurement_correct_fb: Sahi! Object bilkul {w} mm chaura hai.
lab.p9_measurement_formula: Total Reading = Main Scale Reading + (Vernier Division × Least Count). Yahan, Least Count = 0.1 mm
lab.p9_measurement_incorrect_fb: Ghalat. Vernier zero se pehle asli scale check karein, phir matching vernier line dhoondhein.
lab.p9_measurement_theory: Vernier Caliper ek aala hai jo internal aur external dimensions ko sahi napta hai. asli Scale: millimeters (mm) mein parti hai. Vernier scale par zero ke chora wala mark parhein. Vernier Scale: 0.1 mm tak precision deti hai. Vernier mark jo asli scale ke kisi mark se bilkul milay, woh dekhein.
lab.p9_pressure_assessment_q: Agar paani ki density 1000 kg/m³ hai aur g = 9.8 m/s² hai, toh lowest hole (depth = 80 cm) par theoretical fluid pressure (Pascals mein) calculate karein.
lab.p9_pressure_hint: P = ρgh. Istamal karein ρ = 1000 kg/m³, g = 9.8 m/s². 80cm ko 0.8m mein tabdeel karein!
lab.p9_pressure_instructions: 1. Can ke side par kale plugs par click karein taake paani bahar aaye. 2. Dekhein ke stream base se kitna door tak jaata hai. 3. Zameen par laal measuring tool ko kheench kar splash point ki distance ko theek se measure karein. 4. Apne readings Data table mein record karein.
lab.p9_pressure_theory: Fluid pressure gehraai ke saath badhta hai jo fluid ke upar ke weight ki wajah se hota hai. Pressure P gehraai h par ek liquid ki density ρ mein hai: P = ρ × g × h. Zyada pressure se hole se zyada ejection velocity (v) milta hai, jo paani ko door tak phenkta hai.
lab.p9_springs_hint: Series mein springs ka same tension hota hai. Total extension har spring ke extension ka majmooa hota hai. 1/k_eq = 1/k1 + 1/k2 + ...
lab.p9_springs_instructions: Springs ki tadaad aur hanging mass adjust karein. Dekhein kaise force parhte hue har spring par ek jaisi hai jabke kul extension barhta hai.
lab.p9_springs_q1: 1. Agar 4 ek jaisi ideal springs 200g mass ko pakarti hain, to top spring kitna parhti hai (N mein)?
lab.p9_springs_q2: 2. Agar ek single spring ka k=100 N/m hai, toh 2 springs ka equivalent spring constant (N/m) kya hoga?
lab.p9_springs_theory: Jab ideal (massless) spring balances series mein jure hote hain, tension poore chain mein ek jaisi hoti hai. Is liye har spring wohi force parta hai. Lekin system ka kul extension har individual spring ke extension ka sum hota hai.

lab.practice_correct_feedback: F = Δp/Δt istemal karte hue, 11.2 / 0.01 = 1120 N — ek person ke weight se bhi zyada!
lab.practice_cricket_q: Ek cricket ball (0.16 kg) 30 m/s par bowl kiya gaya aur 40 m/s par ulte disha mein hit kiya gaya. Contact time: 0.01 s.
lab.practice_find_answer: Ikhtiraq shuda formula se jawab talash karein.
lab.practice_force_q: Bat ke zariye lagai gayi average force kya hai?
lab.proof_step_desc: Mantiqi suboot par qadam ba qadam amal karein
lab.real_life_airbags: Airbags crash ke doran impact ke time ko barhate hain — Δt ko 0.01s se 0.1s karne se force 10 guna kam ho jati hai, yahi wajah hai ke airbags peak force kam karke jaanen bachate hain.
lab.recoil_adjust_desc: Sliders adjust karein, phir FIRE! daba kar conservation ka momentum ko amal mein dekhein.
lab.recoil_correct_feedback: Sahi! vg = 1.5 m/s. Rifle sirf 1.5 m/s pichay hati hai kyunki yeh bullet se kaafi bhaari hai.
lab.recoil_final_desc: Bandook bullet ki simt ke mukhalif simt mein pichay hati hai
lab.recoil_incorrect_feedback: Bilkul nahi. vg = (mb × vb) / mg = (0.012 × 500) / 4 ka istemal karo
lab.recoil_practice_q: Ek 4 kg rifle 12 g bullet 500 m/s se fire karti hai.
lab.recoil_practice_q2: Rifle ki recoil velocity kya hai?
lab.recoil_real_life: Firefighters ko hose istemal karne se pehle apni jagah mazboot karni hoti hai — aage shooting water utni hi pichay ki force (recoil) paida karti hai, bilkul rocket ki tarah jo gas nikaal kar space mein chalta hai.
lab.recoil_step1_detail: 🎯 Aap shooting range mein hain, 4 kg ki rifle aap ke kandhe par hai. Aap saans lete hain, nishana lagate hain, aur trigger dabaate hain. Gun + bullet ek "isolated system" banate hain — firing se pehle ka momentum firing ke baad ke momentum ke barabar hona chahiye.
lab.recoil_step2_detail: Firing se pehle, rifle aur 10 g bullet dono aap ke haathon mein bilkul abhi tak hain. Kul shuruati momentum = 0. Sab kuch khamosh, mustaqil — zero motion, zero momentum. Phir firing pin strike karta hai.
lab.recoil_step2_label: fair krne se pehle: hr chyz sakn halt mein
lab.recoil_step3_detail: BANG! Goli 400 m/s par aage badhti hai. Iska momentum: 0.01 × 400 = 4 kg·m/s aage. Conservation ke zariye, gun ka momentum aapke kandhe ki taraf −4 kg·m/s hona chahiye: m_b·v_b + m_g·v_g = 0.
lab.recoil_step3_label: fair krne ke baad: goly + bndoq Harkat krty hai
lab.recoil_step4_detail: Hal karte hue: v_g = −(m_b·v_b)/m_g = −(0.01 × 400)/4 = −1 m/s. Negative sign? Gun aap ke kandhe mein 1 m/s se pichay latkti hai. Bhaari gun kam recoil karti hai — yahi wajah hai ke competition shooters bhaari rifles istemal karte hain. Rockets bhi yahi kaam karte hain: exhaust neeche jata hai, rocket upar jata hai!
lab.recoil_subtitle: Momentum ke tahafuz se recoil formula hasil karne ka tareeqa
lab.recoil_title: Derivation: bndoq ka pchayrta hoa Raftaar

lab.s8greenhouseeffect_the_glass_jar_all: The glass jar allows light energy in, but prevents the warmed air from escaping. This traps thermal energy, causing the temperature to rise rapidly.

lab.s8kneejerk_sensory_neurons_send_a_si: Sensory neurons send a signal to the spinal cord.

lab.s8makingyogurt_kills_off_unwanted_na: Kills off unwanted, naturally occurring bacteria in the milk.
lab.s8makingyogurt_the_bacteria_eat_the_: The bacteria eat the milk sugars (lactose) and excrete lactic acid. This acid makes the milk curdle and thicken into yogurt!
lab.s8makingyogurt_we_add_existing_yogur: hum shamil karna maujooda yogurt kyunke it contains living
lab.s8milkplastic_the_acid_in_the_vinega: The acid in the vinegar separated the milk into liquid whey and solid curds (Casein). These curds can be strained, dried, and kneaded into a natural, moldable plastic!
lab.s8neutralization_the_pink_color_comp: The pink color completely disappeared. This shows that the acid has exactly neutralized the base to form salt and water.
lab.s8periscope_light_from_the_apple_ent: Light from the apple enters the top window, reflects 90° down the tube off the first 45° mirror, and reflects another 90° off the bottom mirror directly into your eye.
lab.s8reflextime_click_the_ruler_area_to: Click the RULER area to catch it when it drops!
lab.s8reflextime_unlike_a_knee_jerk_refl: Unlike a knee-jerk reflex, catching a ruler is a voluntary action processed by the brain. It takes time for the eye to see it drop, the brain to process it, and a signal to reach the hand muscles.

lab.s8soapmaking_the_lye_and_oil_have_fu: The lye and oil have fully reacted (saponified) to create safe, usable soap bars.
lab.s8stimulusresponse_animals_naturally: Animals naturally respond to environmental changes (stimuli) to survive.
lab.s8stimulusresponse_when_half_the_pet: When half the petri dish is covered, you will notice the termites gradually migrate to the darker side and stay there. Termites prefer dark, moist environments (negative phototaxis) to protect themselves from predators and dehydration.

lab.s8toothpaste_almost_there_check_your: taqreeban wahan, check aap ka measurements.
lab.s8toothpaste_perfect_formula_you_hav: Perfect Formula! You have created functional homemade toothpaste.
lab.s8toothpaste_too_much_stick_to_the_r: Too much! Stick to the recipe measurements.

lab.step1_detail: 🚴 Aap 10 m/s se muhallay ki gali mein cycle chala rahe hain jab ek bacha ball ke peeche bhagta hua nikalta hai. Aap brakes lagate hain. Newton's 2nd law kehta hai F = ma — brake pads rim ko dabaate hain, ek force lagate hain jo aap ko decelerate karti hai.
lab.step2_detail: Aap ki speed 2 seconds mein 10 m/s se 0 ho jati hai. Tabdeeli ki sharah acceleration hai: a = (0 − 10)/2 = −5 m/s². Aap ka body aage ko jhukta hai — yeh inertia hai jo change ke khilaf mazahemat kar rahi hai. Negative sign? Aap slow ho rahe hain, matlab force backward hai.
lab.step3_detail: Aap + aapki bike = 80 kg. F = 80 × (0 − 10)/2 = −400 N. Mass ko distribute karo: F = (80×0 − 80×10)/2 = (0 − 800)/2. Aapki brakes 400 N ka force laga rahi hain — choti si adult ke wazan ke barabar jo aapki motion ke khilaf push kar raha hai!
lab.step3_label: a ko F = ma mein shamil karein
lab.step4_detail: Momentum p = mv aap ki "quantity of motion" ko zahir karta hai. Aap ne p = 80 × 10 = 800 kg·m/s se start kiya. 2 seconds mein, woh momentum zero ho jata hai. To F = Δp/Δt = (0 − 800)/2 = −400 N. Force sirf yeh hai ke momentum kitni tezi se change hota hai. Yahi wajah hai ke airbags jaan bachate hain — woh impact time Δt ko barhate hain, jis se force F kam ho jati hai!

theorem.class10.alternate_segment.finalF.4: Tangent aur chord ke beech ki kooni, alternate segment meh kooni ke barabar hoti hai.

theorem.class10.alternate_segment.keyIns.5: Sailors yeh theorem use karte hain: coastline (tangent) aur lighthouse tak ki line (chord) ke beech ki kooni, unki position ko determine karta hai. Yeh circle geometry meh sabse khoobsurat theorems meh se ek hai!

theorem.class10.alternate_segment.step1_.9: 🎯 Ek circle draw karein jismein tangent PT point A par hai. Chord AB draw karein, aur ∠APT ko tangent aur chord ke beech meh draw karein.

theorem.class10.alternate_segment.step1_.6: Tangent aur chord ko draw karein

theorem.class10.alternate_segment.step2_.10: Chord AB circle ko do segments meh divide karta hai. Alternate segment tangent ke opposite side par hota hai.

theorem.class10.alternate_segment.step3_.text: Tangent aur chord ke beech ki kooni, alternate segment mein woh kooni hoti hai.

theorem.class10.area_aas.finalFormulaDes.text: Ek side aur do angle ka upyog karke area.

theorem.class10.area_aas.keyInsight.text: Pahad ki chotiyan matra karne ke liye puri tarah sahi hai! Jab aap dono adjacent sides ko matra nahi kar sakte hain lekin door se angle matra kar sakte hain, to yeh formula aapko area deta hai.

theorem.class10.area_aas.practice_errorH.text: Δ = ½ a² sin β sin γ / sin α

theorem.class10.area_aas.practice_questi.text: a=7, β=70°, γ=60°. α=50°. Kshetrafal khojein.

theorem.class10.area_aas.step1_detail.text: 📋 Jab aap do angle (β, γ) aur shamil side a (AAS) jaante hain, to Δ = ½ ab sin γ se shuru karein.

theorem.class10.area_aas.step2_detail.text: Law of Sines se: b/sin β = a/sin α → b = a sin β / sin α.

theorem.class10.area_aas.step2_label.text: Law of Sines ka istemal karke b ko khojein

theorem.class10.area_aas.step3_detail.text: Δ = ½ a × (a sin β / sin α) × sin γ. Yeh formula sirf ek side length aur do angle ke liye zaroori hai!

theorem.class10.area_sas.finalFormulaDes.text: Do tarafon aur unke beech ke koon ke madhyam se ek triangle ka kshetrafal.

theorem.class10.area_sas.keyInsight.text: Zameen ki survey karne wale is formula se pyar karte hain: do tarafon ko kamrein aur unke beech ke koon ko kamrein, aur aapko kshetrafal mil jata hai - perimeter ko chalne ki zaroorat nahin hai!

theorem.class10.area_sas.practice_questi.text: b=5, c=6, α=30°. Kya area hai?

theorem.class10.area_sas.step1_detail.text: 🌳 AB ke side c ko base ke roop mein lete hain. Uchchai AB se C tak ki perpendiculer hai.

theorem.class10.area_sas.step2_detail.text: Triangle ACD se, height h = b sin α.

theorem.class10.area_sas.step3_detail.text: Agar α = 90° hai, to sin 90° = 1, isliye Δ = ½bc — familiar right triangle area formula hai!

theorem.class10.central_angle.finalFormu.text: Central angle koi bhi inscribed angle jo usi arc ko subtend karta hai, double hota hai.

theorem.class10.central_angle.keyInsight.text: Isliye, semicircle mein angle 90° hota hai — central angle 180° (ek stree line) hota hai, isliye inscribed angle half hota hai: 90°. Yeh circle geometry ka 'Sona Theorem' hai!

theorem.class10.central_angle.practice_q.text: Inscribed angle ne ek arc ko 35° subtend kiya hai. Central angle kitna hai?

theorem.class10.central_angle.step1_deta.text: 📐 Chord CD ko draw karein. Central angle ∠COD aur inscribed angle ∠CED, dono hi chord CD ko subtend karte hain.

theorem.class10.central_angle.step1_labe.text: Central aur inscribed angles ko draw karein

theorem.class10.central_angle.step2_deta.text: OE ko F tak badhayein. Kyunki OC = OE (radii), triangle COE isosceles hai. Exterior angle ∠COF = 2∠CEO.

theorem.class10.central_angle.step2_labe.text: O ko E se jodein aur extend karein

theorem.class10.central_angle.step4_deta.text: ∠COD = 2∠CEO + 2∠DEO = 2(∠CEO + ∠DEO) = 2∠CED. Central angle ALWAYS inscribed angle se do guna hota hai!

theorem.class10.centre_bisects.finalForm.text: Ek line centre se chord ke midpoint tak perpendicular hai chord se.

theorem.class10.centre_bisects.keyInsigh.text: Yehi wajah hai ki ek spirit level kaam karta hai — bubble ka centre line surface se perpendicular hota hai. Construction mein, yeh theorem circular pipes ko level rakhne ke liye zaroori hota hai.

theorem.class10.centre_bisects.practice_.text: Ek circle ki radius 10 hai, aur chord ka midpoint centre se 6 units door hai. Chord ki half length kya hai?

theorem.class10.centre_bisects.step1_det.text: ⚽ Ek circle par chord AB lein. Uska midpoint C mark karein. Centre O se C tak ek line draw karein.

theorem.class10.centre_bisects.step1_lab.text: Chord AB ko draw karein, aur uska midpoint C mark karein.

theorem.class10.centre_bisects.step2_det.text: OA aur OB radii hain, isliye OA = OB. Triangle OAB isosceles hai, jo O par apex hai.

theorem.class10.centre_bisects.step3_det.text: Isosceles triangle OAB mein, centre O se base AB ke midpoint C tak ki line bhi altitude hai. Isliye OC AB se perpendicular hai.

theorem.class10.centre_bisects.title.text: Theorem 9.2: Chord ke Midpoint se Centre tak ki line perpendicular hai

theorem.class10.circum_radius.finalFormu.text: Triangle ke sabhi vertices ko pass karne wali circle ki radius.

theorem.class10.circum_radius.keyInsight.text: Circumradius triangle ke teen sides aur area se judi hai! Ek saman-bahoo triangle ke liye, R = a/√3. Triangle ka size badhne par circumcircle bhi badhta hai. Yeh gear aur wheel design mein use hota hai.

theorem.class10.circum_radius.practice_q.text: a=5, b=6, c=7, Δ≈14.7. R khojein.

theorem.class10.circum_radius.step1_deta.text: 🌍 Ek circle sabhi teen vertices ke through draw karein. Ek diameter BD draw karein. Kyunki α aur ∠BDC ek hi segment mein hain, ∠BDC = α hai.

theorem.class10.circum_radius.step2_deta.text: Triangle BCD (angle in a semicircle) mein: a/(2R) = sin α → R = a/(2 sin α).

theorem.class10.circum_radius.step2_labe.text: Right triangle mein sine ka upyog karein

theorem.class10.circum_radius.step3_deta.text: Area formula se: Δ = ½ bc sin α → sin α = 2Δ/(bc).

theorem.class10.circum_radius.step3_labe.text: Sides aur area ke terms mein vyakt karein

theorem.class10.circum_radius.step4_deta.text: R = a/(2 × 2Δ/(bc)) = abc/(4Δ). Circumradius sabhi teen sides aur area se juda hai!

theorem.class10.circum_radius.step4_labe.text: Formula nikalne ke liye substitute karein

theorem.class10.congruent_arcs.finalForm: Bara bar arc equal chord ke barabar hota hai.
theorem.class10.congruent_arcs.keyInsigh: Samaan gear daanton (arc) ke liye smooth meshing ke liye samaan chord ki lambai honi chahiye. Map-making mein, samaan arc of latitude globe par equal chord pehchanate hain.
theorem.class10.congruent_arcs.practice_: Haan, saman arcs ke saath barabar chords hota hai.
Samanya kendra kee kooni → barabar arcs → barabar chords.
Aur AB aur CD dono ke beech se 60° ki parikalpan hoti hai. Chords AB aur CD bhi barabar hain kya?
theorem.class10.congruent_arcs.step1_det: 🎵 Do alag-alag arc ek circle par sochna, jaise circular railway track ke equal-length curved sections.
theorem.class10.congruent_arcs.step2_det: Kyonki arc bara bar hain, ek arc ko doosre par rotate karein. Unke endpoints match ho jate hain.
theorem.class10.congruent_arcs.step3_det: Chords corresponding endpoints se judte hain. Kyonki arc perfectly overlap hote hain, chords samaan hona chahiye.
theorem.class10.congruent_arcs.title: Theorem 9.6: Bara bar arc

theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.finalFormula.text: Ek cyclic quadrilateral ke opposite angle ka sum 180° hota hai.

theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.keyInsight.text: Ek rectangular picture frame har baar ek circle mein inscribed ho sakta hai kyunki uske opposite angle 90°+90°=180° hota hai. Is theorem ko surveying mein use kiya jata hai, chaukhat ke char points ek circle par hain ya nahi check karne ke liye!

theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.practice_que.text: Ek cyclic quadrilateral mein, ∠A = 80°. ∠C ko khojna hai.

theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.step1_detail.text: 🔷 Ek quadrilateral ABCD ko circle mein inscribed karein (sab vertices circle par hain).

theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.step1_label.text: Cyclic quadrilateral ABCD ko draw karein

theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.step2_detail.text: O ko A, B, C, D se jodein. Arc BCD ko reflex ∠BOD parikrama karne wala kendra hai. Arc BAD ko ∠BOD parikrama karta hai.

theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.step2_label.text: Centre O ko vertices se jod dein

theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.step3_detail.text: ∠A = ½×(reflex ∠BOD) aur ∠C = ½×(∠BOD). Do central angles 360° ke sum hote hain.

theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.step3_label.text: Central angle theorem ka apply karein

theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.step4_detail.text: ∠A + ∠C = ½(360°) = 180°. Isi tarah, ∠B + ∠D = 180°. Ek cyclic quadrilateral ke opposite angles supplementary hote hain!

theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.title.text: Theorem 10.12: Ek cyclic quadrilateral ke opposite angle alag-alag hain (supplementary)

theorem.class10.equal_angles_chords.fina.text: Center par ek angle ke barabar hota hai, uske barabar chords hota hai.

theorem.class10.equal_angles_chords.keyI.text: Yeh cycle complete hota hai: barabar chords ↔ barabar central angles ↔ barabar arcs. Engineering mein circular flange par evenly spaced holes banane ke liye use hota hai!

theorem.class10.equal_angles_chords.prac: Yes, equal central angles always subtend equal chords.

theorem.class10.equal_angles_chords.prac.text: Central angles ∠AOB = ∠COD = 45°. Chords AB aur CD barabar hain?

theorem.class10.equal_angles_chords.step.text: 📐 AB aur CD ke saath ek do chords draw karein jo ke barabar central angles ke saath hain.
Barabar central angles ke saath chords draw karein
OA = OC (radii), OB = OD (radii), ∠AOB = ∠COD (diya gaya). SAS congruence.
Congruence se, AB = CD. Barabar central angles ke saath chords barabar hota hai.

theorem.class10.equal_angles_chords.titl.text: Theorem 9.9: Equal Central Angles → Equal Chords

theorem.class10.equal_chords_angles.fina.text: Barabar chords central centre par barabar angles subtend karte hain.

theorem.class10.equal_chords_angles.keyI.text: Barabar pizza crust slices (chords) barabar central angles ka matlab hai — aapko barabar-sized slices mil jayenge! Yeh theorem yeh batata hai ki circle par barabar spacing equal angles create karta hai, polygon construction mein fundamental hai.

theorem.class10.equal_chords_angles.prac: Barabar chord barabar central koonjey ko subtend karte hain
∠COD = 60°. Barabar chord barabar koonjey ko centre par subtend karte hain.
Barabar chord → barabar central koonjey ko subtend karte hain.
Chord AB = chord CD ek hi circle mein. Agar ∠AOB = 60°, to ∠COD kitna hai?
theorem.class10.equal_chords_angles.step: Do barabar chord AB aur CD ek circle mein draw karein. Unke endpoints ko centre O se jod dein.
OA = OC (radii), OB = OD (radii), AB = CD (diya gaya). SSS congruence.
Congruence se, ∠AOB = ∠COD. Barabar chord barabar central koonjey ko subtend karte hain.

theorem.class10.equal_chords_angles.titl.text: Theorem 9.8: Barabar Chords → Barabar Angles at Centre

theorem.class10.equal_chords_arcs.finalF: Barabar chords saman arcs ko prasann karte hain.
theorem.class10.equal_chords_arcs.keyIns: Barabar chords ↔ barabar kendra kee kooni ↔ saman arcs. Yah ek-ek kooni prasangikataa circular geometry aur compass aur straightedge constructions mein upyog ki jaati hai.

theorem.class10.equal_chords_arcs.practi.text: Barabar chords hamesha congruent arcs subtend karte hain.
Barabar chords → barabar central angles → barabar arcs.
Do barabar chords kya kind ki arcs subtend karte hain?
